name: Cinnabon Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm milk in a large bowl.
2. Add the sugar, margarine, salt, eggs, and flour; mix well.
3. Knead the dough into a large ball using your hands lightly dusted with flour.
4. Place the bowl in a warm place and cover; let rise about 1 hour or until doubled.
5. Roll the dough out on a lightly floured surface to be approximately 21 inches long, 16 inches wide, and about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
7. Combine brown sugar and cinnamon in a bowl; spread softened margarine evenly over the surface of the dough.
8. Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar mixture evenly over the dough.
9. Carefully roll from the top edge, resulting in a length of about 21 inches.
10. Cut the rolled dough into 1 3/4-inch slices and place 6 at a time evenly spaced in a lightly greased baking pan.
11. Bake for 10 minutes or until lightly browned on top.
12. Combine icing ingredients; beat well with an electric mixer until fluffy.
13. Immediately coat each roll generously with icing after removing from the oven.
